description: Properties of biological molecules; enzyme kinetics, enzyme reactors, and enzyme engineering; metabolic engineering; microbial growth kinetics; bioreactor design; bioseparations.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing and (ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY  101and102,ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY/​BOTANY  151,ZOOLOGY 153, orBIOCORE 383), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
